handoffs.reason: Candidate mission 'Orchestrator Launcher Reliability And Test Harness' accepted by Orchestrator. Linear issue ENG-213 created. Mission folder opened.
TASK-A (launcher detach + codex flag drift) dispatched in-session per human decision A. codex exec --cd verified present on installed CLI; --ask-for-approval confirmed absent.

TASK-A implementation complete. Three code edits applied; print + background smoke for both runtimes green; resolution entry recorded in mission incidents.md. Worker report at reports/TASK-A-worker-report.md flags acceptance criterion #4 phrasing for Verifier review (Needs decision).

Continue per human decision Y: in-session sequential wave for TASK-B (unit tests), TASK-C (background-survival integration), TASK-D (SIGHUP regression), TASK-E (contract drift, env-gated), TASK-F (runtime.json schema), TASK-G (run_wave + status_wave smokes), TASK-H (tests/README.md + docs). Acceptance #4 rephrased.

TASK-B-H complete. 10 test files added under .agents/skills/agent-orchestrator/tests/. 34 passed by default + 4 contract-drift passed when env-gated = 38 total. Acceptance #4 grep scoped to active code (scripts + SKILL.md + .claude/commands) returns empty. Worker report at reports/TASK-B-H-worker-report.md.

Final verifier sweep PASSED. All 7 acceptance criteria green. Full pytest suite 34 passed + 4 contract passed when env-gated. Mission ready for human review before integration / commit / PR. Recommended next step: human approval, then create branch eduardk/eng-213-... and commit + open PR.

Verifier ACCEPT TASK-A. Independent V1-V11 sweep passed: py_compile OK, codex CLI flag drift purged from active code, print-mode commands correct for codex/codex+bypass/claude-code, background smoke produced workers with ppid=1 (proof setsid detach worked) and non-empty logs for both runtimes, SKILL.md + .claude/commands/orchestrator.md updated, incidents.md Resolution entry present, worker report well-formed. Do-not-merge until TASK-B-H complete (acceptance #3 pytest suite). Needs decision from orchestrator: acceptance #4 grep phrasing — recommend tightening scope to `.agents/skills` + `.claude/commands` (active code), excluding audit/strategy/mission docs.
